synonyms: Отъезжать, отходить (о транспорте) - depart, pull out, move away

examples.eng: She pulled away when he tried to kiss her.
examples.ru: Она отстранилась, когда он попытался её поцеловать.

examples.eng: He pulled away from the relationship.
He pulled away from the parking spot.
He pulled away from the group.
The car pulled away just in time.
She pulled away from the curb.
They pulled away from each other.
The train pulled away from the station.
She pulled away from his embrace.
The leader is pulling away now, and is sure to win.
examples.ru: Лидер уходит в отрыв, теперь он точно выиграет.

examples.eng: Pull away, boys! A little more effort, and we'll soon reach the shore.
examples.ru: Гребем, гребем, ребята! Еще немного, и мы у берега.
